seoTitle: Typeform Tutorial for Beginners: Getting Started Guide
metaDescription: A beginner's walkthrough of Typeform covering form creation, design customization, logic, AI features, and sharing your first form.
intro: Starting from a blank Typeform account can feel like a lot to figure out, especially with newer AI-powered features added to the mix. This beginner tutorial walks through creating your first form, customizing its design, adding logic, and sharing it to collect responses.

steps.heading: Create your first Typeform
steps.body: Start a new form from a template or a blank canvas, then add the question types you need for a survey, quiz, or lead generation form.

steps.heading: Customize questions and design
steps.body: Adjust themes, branding, and layout so the form matches your style, and refine question wording to keep it clear for respondents.

steps.heading: Use AI features and logic
steps.body: Explore Typeform's AI-powered tools to help build questions faster, and set up conditional logic so the form adapts based on how someone answers.

steps.heading: Share, integrate, and collect responses
steps.body: Publish your form, share it through a link or embed, connect any integrations you need, and monitor incoming responses as they arrive.

faq.question: Is Typeform free to start with?
faq.answer: Typeform offers a free plan with limited features, which is enough to build and test your first forms before deciding on a paid plan.

faq.question: Do I need design experience to make a good-looking form?
faq.answer: No, Typeform's built-in themes and templates handle most of the design work, so you can adjust colors and branding without starting from scratch.

faq.question: What is Typeform Logic used for?
faq.answer: Logic lets you show or skip questions based on previous answers, which helps personalize the form experience and keep it relevant to each respondent.

faq.question: Can beginners use Typeform's AI features right away?
faq.answer: Yes, the AI-powered tools are built into the editor and are meant to speed up form creation even for people new to the platform.
